en: Now the leaders of the people lived in Jerusalem. And the rest of the people cast lots to bring one out of ten to live in Jerusalem the holy city, while nine out of ten remained in the other towns.
zh: 那時，民眾的領袖住在耶路撒冷；其餘的民眾都抽籤，抽出十分之一，住在聖城耶路撒冷，餘下的十分之九就住在別的城鎮。

en: And the people blessed all the men who willingly offered to live in Jerusalem.
zh: 眾人為所有自願住在耶路撒冷的人祝福。

en: These are the chiefs of the province who lived in Jerusalem; but in the towns of Judah everyone lived on his property in their towns: Israel, the priests, the Levites, the temple servants, and the descendants of Sol-omon's servants.
zh: 以色列人、祭司、利未人、作殿役的和所羅門僕人的子孫，各住在猶大眾城自己的地業中；猶大省的首領住在耶路撒冷的，有以下這些人：

en: And in Jerusalem lived certain of the sons of Judah and of the sons of Benjamin. Of the sons of Judah: Athaiah the son of Uzziah, son of Zechariah, son of Amariah, son of Shephatiah, son of Mahalalel, of the sons of Perez;
zh: 有些猶大的子孫和便雅憫的子孫，住在耶路撒冷。猶大的子孫有：法勒斯的子孫烏西雅的兒子亞他雅；烏西雅是撒迦利雅的兒子，撒迦利雅是亞瑪利雅的兒子，亞瑪利雅是示法提雅的兒子，示法提雅是瑪勒列的兒子。

en: and Maaseiah the son of Baruch, son of Col-hozeh, son of Hazaiah, son of Adaiah, son of Joiarib, son of Zechariah, son of the Shilonite.
zh: 又有巴錄的兒子瑪西雅；巴錄是谷何西的兒子，谷何西是哈賽雅的兒子，哈賽雅是亞大雅的兒子，亞大雅是約雅立的兒子，約雅立是撒迦利雅的兒子，撒迦利雅是示羅尼的兒子。

en: All the sons of Perez who lived in Jerusalem were 468 valiant men.
zh: 所有住在耶路撒冷的法勒斯子孫，共四百六十八人，他們都是勇士。

en: And these are the sons of Benjamin: Sallu the son of Meshullam, son of Joed, son of Pedaiah, son of Kolaiah, son of Maaseiah, son of Ithiel, son of Jeshaiah,
zh: 便雅憫的子孫有：米書蘭的兒子撒路；米書蘭是約葉的兒子，約葉是毘大雅的兒子，毘大雅是哥賴雅的兒子，哥賴雅是瑪西雅的兒子，瑪西雅是以鐵的兒子，以鐵是耶篩亞的兒子。

en: and his brothers, men of valor, 928.
zh: 他的眾兄弟都是勇士 ，共九百二十八人。

en: Joel the son of Zichri was their overseer; and Judah the son of Hassenuah was second over the city.
zh: 細基利的兒子約珥是管理他們的官長；哈西努亞的兒子猶大是那城的副市長。

en: Of the priests: Jedaiah the son of Joiarib, Jachin,
zh: 祭司有：約雅立的兒子耶大雅，又有雅斤，

en: Seraiah the son of Hilkiah, son of Meshullam, son of Zadok, son of Meraioth, son of Ahitub, ruler of the house of God,
zh: 以及神殿的總管西萊雅；西萊雅是希勒家的兒子，希勒家是米書蘭的兒子，米書蘭是撒督的兒子，撒督是米拉約的兒子，米拉約是亞希突的兒子；

en: and their brothers who did the work of the house, 822; and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, son of Pelaliah, son of Amzi, son of Zechariah, son of Pashhur, son of Malchijah,
zh: 還有他們的親族，在殿裡工作事奉的，共八百二十二人；又有耶羅罕的兒子亞大雅；耶羅罕是毘拉利的兒子，毘拉利是暗洗的兒子，暗洗是撒迦利亞的兒子，撒迦利亞是巴施戶珥的兒子，巴施戶珥是瑪基雅的兒子；

en: and his brothers, heads of fathers' houses, 242; and Amashsai, the son of Azarel, son of Ahzai, son of Meshillemoth, son of Immer,
zh: 還有他的親族作族長的共二百四十二人；又有亞薩列的兒子亞瑪帥；亞薩列是亞哈賽的兒子，亞哈賽是米實利末的兒子，米實利末是音麥的兒子；

en: and their brothers, mighty men of valor, 128; their overseer was Zabdiel the son of Haggedolim.
zh: 又有他們的親族，英勇的戰士共一百二十八人；哈基多琳的兒子撒巴第業是管理他們的官長。

en: And of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, son of Azrikam, son of Hashabiah, son of Bunni;
zh: 利未人有：哈述的兒子示瑪雅；哈述是押利甘的兒子，押利甘是哈沙比雅的兒子，哈沙比雅是布尼的兒子；

en: and Shabbethai and Jozabad, of the chiefs of the Levites, who were over the outside work of the house of God;
zh: 又有利未人的族長沙比太和約撒拔，管理神殿的外務。

en: and Mattaniah the son of Mica, son of Zabdi, son of Asaph, who was the leader of the praise, who gave thanks, and Bakbukiah, the second among his brothers; and Abda the son of Shammua, son of Galal, son of Jeduthun.
zh: 米迦的兒子瑪他尼，領導讚美，獻上感謝的禱告；米迦是撒底的兒子，撒底是亞薩的兒子；八布迦在他的兄弟中作副手；還有沙母亞的兒子押大，沙母亞是加拉的兒子，加拉是耶杜頓的兒子。

en: All the Levites in the holy city were 284.
zh: 所有在聖城的利未人，共二百八十四人。

en: The gatekeepers, Akkub, Talmon and their brothers, who kept watch at the gates, were 172.
zh: 守門的有：亞谷和達們，以及他們的親族，看守各門，共一百七十二人。

en: And the rest of Israel, and of the priests and the Levites, were in all the towns of Judah, every one in his inheritance.
zh: 其餘的以色列人、祭司、利未人各住在猶大眾城自己的地業中。

en: But the temple servants lived on Ophel; and Ziha and Gishpa were over the temple servants.
zh: 作殿役的住在俄斐勒；西哈和基斯帕管理作殿役的人。

en: The overseer of the Levites in Jerusalem was Uzzi the son of Bani, son of Hashabiah, son of Mattaniah, son of Mica, of the sons of Asaph, the singers, over the work of the house of God.
zh: 在耶路撒冷管理利未人的，是巴尼的兒子烏西，巴尼是哈沙比雅的兒子，哈沙比雅是瑪他尼的兒子，瑪他尼是米迦的兒子，他是亞薩的子孫，就是那些管理神殿事務的歌唱者。

en: For there was a command from the king concerning them, and a fixed provision for the singers, as every day required.
zh: 王命令他們，規定歌唱者每天當盡的責任。

en: And Pethahiah the son of Meshezabel, of the sons of Zerah the son of Judah, was at the king's side in all matters concerning the people.
zh: 猶大的兒子謝拉的子孫中，米示薩別的兒子毘他希雅是王的助手，統管一切民事。

en: And as for the villages, with their fields, some of the people of Judah lived in Kiriath-arba and its villages, and in Dibon and its villages, and in Jekabzeel and its villages,
zh: 至於村莊和所屬的田地，有些猶大人住在基列．亞巴和屬於基列．亞巴的鄉村，有些住在底本和屬於底本的鄉村，有些住在葉甲薛和屬於葉甲薛的村莊，

en: and in Jeshua and in Moladah and Beth-pelet,
zh: 有些住在耶書亞、摩拉大、伯．帕列、

en: in Hazar-shual, in Beersheba and its villages,
zh: 哈薩．書亞、別是巴和屬於別是巴的鄉村，

en: in Ziklag, in Meconah and its villages,
zh: 有些住在洗革拉、米哥拿和屬於米哥拿的鄉村，

en: in En-rimmon, in Zorah, in Jarmuth,
zh: 有些住在音．臨門、瑣拉、耶末、

en: Zanoah, Adullam, and their villages, Lachish and its fields, and Azekah and its villages. So they encamped from Beersheba to the valley of Hinnom.
zh: 撒挪亞、亞杜蘭和屬於這兩地的村莊，拉吉和屬於拉吉的田地，亞西加和屬於亞西加的鄉村；他們安營居住的地方，從別是巴直到欣嫩谷。

en: The people of Benjamin also lived from Geba onward, at Michmash, Aija, Bethel and its villages,
zh: 有些便雅憫人住在迦巴、密抹、亞雅、伯特利和屬於伯特利的鄉村，

en: Anathoth, Nob, Ananiah,
zh: 有些住在亞拿突、挪伯、亞難雅、

en: Hazor, Ramah, Gittaim,
zh: 夏瑣、拉瑪、基他音、

en: Hadid, Zeboim, Neballat,
zh: 哈疊、洗編、尼八拉、

en: Lod, and Ono, the valley of craftsmen.
zh: 羅德、阿挪和匠人谷；

en: And certain divisions of the Levites in Judah were assigned to Benjamin.
zh: 有些利未人曾經住在猶大地，卻歸到便雅憫地。
